title: GitHub - Northwood-Systems/millwright: Self-hosted LLM router. Cost effective, deterministic, and fast. Secure and private by default.
excerpt: Self-hosted LLM router. Cost effective, deterministic, and fast. Secure and private by default. - Northwood-Systems/millwright
content_html:
The self-hosted LLM router for policy, cache affinity, and spend control in one Rust Binary.

What is Millwright

Millwright is an open-source, self hosted LLM router that runs between your AI applications and the model providers you choose. It accepts OpenAI Chat Completions and Anthropic Messages, then routes each request to an OpenAI-compatible API, Anthropic, or Amazon Bedrock.

You define which models belong in the cheap, mid, and frontier roles. Millwright selects the lowest estimated-cost healthy route the resolved role permits and, when given a session ID, preserves provider/model affinity for prompt-cache reuse.

Millwright is a router, not an agent orchestrator. It does not spawn agents, schedule work, inspect prompts, or rewrite context.

Why Millwright

LLM costs rise quickly when every request reaches the most expensive model and provider changes break prompt-cache reuse. Millwright makes the lower-cost path explicit:

  • Control model spend — reserve frontier models for the work your policy says needs them.
  • Protect prompt caches — role-scoped affinity keeps each session on a confirmed provider and model while its cache window is warm.
  • Keep concurrent agents moving — one session can maintain independent cheap, mid, and frontier lanes without serializing requests.
  • Change providers without changing application code — route compatible traffic across providers behind one endpoint.
  • Keep routing inspectable — response headers identify the chosen route; traces and ledger entries retain the evidence when persistence is available.
  • Run the data plane yourself — provider credentials stay on your infrastructure, with no required hosted control plane.

Get Started

Quick Start

Rust 1.97+ is required when building from source.

git clone https://github.com/Northwood-Systems/millwright.git
cd millwright
cargo install --path . --locked
millwright init
millwright serve

millwright init walks through provider endpoints, model roles, pricing, and separate workload and operator keys. It stores references to provider-secret environment variables, never the provider credentials themselves.

Connect Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Pi, or another compatible client. Choose millwright-fast, millwright-code, or millwright-plan to request the cheap, mid, or frontier role.

Optional Local Demo

The included Docker Compose setup starts Millwright with a mock provider and local demo key:

make compose-up

From another terminal:

curl http://localhost:8080/v1/chat/completions \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-millwright-local-demo' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"model":"millwright-fast","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Hello from Millwright"}]}'

Architecture · Router API · Policy & Catalog · Deployment · Cost Analysis · Security

Features

Policy-controlled routing

Classify requests with explicit task and risk headers, the client's model selection, or documented defaults. Millwright resolves a cheap, mid, or frontier role, then selects the lowest estimated-cost healthy model that policy allows. High-risk and planning requests always use the frontier role.

Every decision includes the chosen model, provider, route reason, and rejected alternatives. Message content is never inspected to make the decision.

Cache-aware concurrency

Naive per-request routing can erase provider prompt-cache savings by switching models mid-session. Millwright keeps independent cheap, mid, and frontier affinity lanes under one opaque session ID, each with its own cache TTL.

Traffic resolved to different roles no longer fights over one warm route. Same-role calls converge on the last confirmed provider/model, while all requests remain concurrent—Millwright does not serialize agent traffic or orchestrate agent lifecycles.

See where the spend goes

Completed requests normally write usage evidence, cost provenance, provider attempts, and routing evidence to the ledger. SQLite is the local default; PostgreSQL is available for production deployments.

Command What it shows
millwright spend Total spend, cache read rate, and per-team breakdown
millwright models Model and provider mix
millwright trace <id> One routing decision, including rejected alternatives
millwright top Live spend and model activity in the terminal

The same data is available through the authenticated /v1/millwright/* management APIs, with JSON output from spend, models, and trace for dashboards and automation.

Analyze cost opportunities

millwright analyze reads a live Millwright ledger or local Millwright, OpenAI-compatible, or Anthropic JSONL. It produces a self-contained HTML or Markdown report plus schema-versioned JSON.

millwright analyze \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:8080 \
  --key "$MILLWRIGHT_OPERATOR_KEY" \
  --since 30d \
  --report analysis.html \
  --json-out analysis.json

Reports separate measured cost evidence from modeled candidate economics. Add an explicit catalog and candidate allowlist to compare full-swap costs and a price-floor economic scenario. Candidate results are cost hypotheses—not quality results or production routing recommendations. See Cost Analysis.

Provider and protocol support

OpenAI Chat Completions and Anthropic Messages come in; OpenAI-compatible APIs, native Anthropic, and Amazon Bedrock go out. Same-protocol routes preserve fields Millwright does not model. Cross-protocol routes translate the supported text-and-tools subset and reject unsupported shapes instead of silently dropping data.

Retryable transport failures, timeouts, HTTP 408/429, and HTTP 5xx responses can trigger one bounded failover attempt. Circuit breakers stop unhealthy routes from receiving every request.

Built for self-hosting

Millwright ships as one Rust binary with Docker and Docker Compose support. Provider credentials remain in environment variables, while separate workload and operator keys control inference and management access. Structured logs omit API keys and prompt payloads; request bodies, concurrency, timeouts, and upstream buffers are bounded.

Enterprise

Need help deploying Millwright inside your infrastructure, integrating a provider, or designing a routing policy for your workload?

Talk to the founder

Contributing

Bug fixes, features, tests, and documentation improvements are welcome. Read CONTRIBUTING.md before opening a pull request.

Quick Start for Contributors

The Rust toolchain is pinned in rust-toolchain.toml.

git clone https://github.com/Northwood-Systems/millwright.git
cd millwright
make build
make test

Code Quality / Linting

Before opening a pull request, run:

make fmt
make lint
make test
make audit

The checks cover Rustfmt, Clippy with warnings denied, all Rust test targets, dependency advisories, approved licenses, and dependency sources. make audit requires cargo-deny. CI also builds the release binary and Docker image.

License

Apache-2.0

sentences.en: The self-hosted LLM router for policy, cache affinity, and spend control in one Rust Binary.
sentences.zh: 自托管 LLM 路由器，用于在一个 Rust 二进制文件中进行策略、缓存关联和支出控制。

blocks.html_en: What is Millwright

sentences.en: What is Millwright
sentences.zh: 什么是米尔赖特

blocks.html_en: Millwright is an open-source, self hosted LLM router that runs between your AI applications and the model providers you choose. It accepts OpenAI Chat Completions and Anthropic Messages, then routes each request to an OpenAI-compatible API, Anthropic, or Amazon Bedrock.

sentences.en: Millwright is an open-source, self hosted LLM router that runs between your AI applications and the model providers you choose.
sentences.zh: Millwright 是一个开源、自托管的 LLM 路由器，可在您的 AI 应用程序和您选择的模型提供商之间运行。

sentences.en: It accepts OpenAI Chat Completions and Anthropic Messages, then routes each request to an OpenAI-compatible API, Anthropic, or Amazon Bedrock.
sentences.zh: 它接受 OpenAI 聊天完成和 Anthropic 消息，然后将每个请求路由到 OpenAI 兼容的 API、Anthropic 或 Amazon Bedrock。

blocks.html_en: You define which models belong in the cheap, mid, and frontier roles. Millwright selects the lowest estimated-cost healthy route the resolved role permits and, when given a session ID, preserves provider/model affinity for prompt-cache reuse.

sentences.en: You define which models belong in the cheap, mid, and frontier roles.
sentences.zh: 您可以定义哪些型号属于廉价、中端和前沿角色。

sentences.en: Millwright selects the lowest estimated-cost healthy route the resolved role permits and, when given a session ID, preserves provider/model affinity for prompt-cache reuse.
sentences.zh: Millwright 选择解析角色允许的最低估计成本的健康路由，并且在给定会话 ID 时，保留提供程序/模型关联以进行提示缓存重用。

blocks.html_en: Millwright is a router, not an agent orchestrator. It does not spawn agents, schedule work, inspect prompts, or rewrite context.

sentences.en: Millwright is a router, not an agent orchestrator.
sentences.zh: Millwright 是一个路由器，而不是代理协调器。

sentences.en: It does not spawn agents, schedule work, inspect prompts, or rewrite context.
sentences.zh: 它不会产生代理、安排工作、检查提示或重写上下文。

blocks.html_en: Why Millwright

sentences.en: Why Millwright
sentences.zh: 为什么选择米尔赖特

blocks.html_en: LLM costs rise quickly when every request reaches the most expensive model and provider changes break prompt-cache reuse. Millwright makes the lower-cost path explicit:

sentences.en: LLM costs rise quickly when every request reaches the most expensive model and provider changes break prompt-cache reuse.
sentences.zh: 当每个请求都到达最昂贵的模型并且提供者的更改破坏提示缓存重用时，LLM 成本会迅速上升。

sentences.en: Millwright makes the lower-cost path explicit:
sentences.zh: Millwright 明确指出了低成本路径：

blocks.html_en: • Control model spend — reserve frontier models for the work your policy says needs them.

sentences.en: Control model spend — reserve frontier models for the work your policy says needs them.
sentences.zh: 控制模型支出——为您的政策所说需要的工作保留前沿模型。

blocks.html_en: • Protect prompt caches — role-scoped affinity keeps each session on a confirmed provider and model while its cache window is warm.

sentences.en: Protect prompt caches — role-scoped affinity keeps each session on a confirmed provider and model while its cache window is warm.
sentences.zh: 保护提示缓存 - 角色范围的亲和力将每个会话保持在已确认的提供者和模型上，同时其缓存窗口处于热状态。

blocks.html_en: • Keep concurrent agents moving — one session can maintain independent cheap, mid, and frontier lanes without serializing requests.

sentences.en: Keep concurrent agents moving — one session can maintain independent cheap, mid, and frontier lanes without serializing requests.
sentences.zh: 保持并发代理移动——一个会话可以维护独立的廉价通道、中间通道和前沿通道，而无需序列化请求。

blocks.html_en: • Change providers without changing application code — route compatible traffic across providers behind one endpoint.

sentences.en: Change providers without changing application code — route compatible traffic across providers behind one endpoint.
sentences.zh: 更改提供商而不更改应用程序代码 - 在一个端点后面的提供商之间路由兼容的流量。

blocks.html_en: • Keep routing inspectable — response headers identify the chosen route; traces and ledger entries retain the evidence when persistence is available.

sentences.en: Keep routing inspectable — response headers identify the chosen route; traces and ledger entries retain the evidence when persistence is available.
sentences.zh: 保持路由可检查——响应标头标识所选路由；当持久性可用时，痕迹和账本条目会保留证据。

blocks.html_en: • Run the data plane yourself — provider credentials stay on your infrastructure, with no required hosted control plane.

sentences.en: Run the data plane yourself — provider credentials stay on your infrastructure, with no required hosted control plane.
sentences.zh: 自行运行数据平面 - 提供商凭据保留在您的基础设施上，无需托管控制平面。

sentences.en: Same-protocol routes preserve fields Millwright does not model.
sentences.zh: 相同协议路由保留 Millwright 未建模的字段。

sentences.en: Cross-protocol routes translate the supported text-and-tools subset and reject unsupported shapes instead of silently dropping data.
sentences.zh: 跨协议路由转换支持的文本和工具子集并拒绝不支持的形状，而不是默默地丢弃数据。

blocks.html_en: Retryable transport failures, timeouts, HTTP 408/429, and HTTP 5xx responses can trigger one bounded failover attempt. Circuit breakers stop unhealthy routes from receiving every request.

sentences.en: Retryable transport failures, timeouts, HTTP 408/429, and HTTP 5xx responses can trigger one bounded failover attempt.
sentences.zh: 可重试的传输失败、超时、HTTP 408/429 和 HTTP 5xx 响应可以触发一次有界故障转移尝试。

sentences.en: Circuit breakers stop unhealthy routes from receiving every request.
sentences.zh: 断路器会阻止不健康的路由接收每个请求。

blocks.html_en: Built for self-hosting

sentences.en: Built for self-hosting
sentences.zh: 专为自托管而构建

blocks.html_en: Millwright ships as one Rust binary with Docker and Docker Compose support. Provider credentials remain in environment variables, while separate workload and operator keys control inference and management access. Structured logs omit API keys and prompt payloads; request bodies, concurrency, timeouts, and upstream buffers are bounded.

sentences.en: Millwright ships as one Rust binary with Docker and Docker Compose support.
sentences.zh: Millwright 作为一种 Rust 二进制文件提供，支持 Docker 和 Docker Compose。

sentences.en: Provider credentials remain in environment variables, while separate workload and operator keys control inference and management access.
sentences.zh: 提供者凭证保留在环境变量中，而单独的工作负载和操作员密钥控制推理和管理访问。

sentences.en: Structured logs omit API keys and prompt payloads; request bodies, concurrency, timeouts, and upstream buffers are bounded.
sentences.zh: 结构化日志省略 API 密钥和提示负载；请求体、并发、超时和上游缓冲区都是有限的。

sentences.en: Enterprise
sentences.zh: 企业

sentences.en: Need help deploying Millwright inside your infrastructure, integrating a provider, or designing a routing policy for your workload?
sentences.zh: 需要帮助在您的基础设施内部署 Millwright、集成提供商或为您的工作负载设计路由策略吗？

content_html_zh:
自托管 LLM 路由器，用于在一个 Rust 二进制文件中进行策略、缓存关联和支出控制。

什么是米尔赖特

Millwright 是一个开源、自托管的 LLM 路由器，可在您的 AI 应用程序和您选择的模型提供商之间运行。 它接受 OpenAI 聊天完成和 Anthropic 消息，然后将每个请求路由到 OpenAI 兼容的 API、Anthropic 或 Amazon Bedrock。

您可以定义哪些型号属于廉价、中端和前沿角色。 Millwright 选择解析角色允许的最低估计成本的健康路由，并且在给定会话 ID 时，保留提供程序/模型关联以进行提示缓存重用。

Millwright 是一个路由器，而不是代理协调器。 它不会产生代理、安排工作、检查提示或重写上下文。

为什么选择米尔赖特

当每个请求都到达最昂贵的模型并且提供者的更改破坏提示缓存重用时，LLM 成本会迅速上升。 Millwright 明确指出了低成本路径：

  • 控制模型支出——为您的政策所说需要的工作保留前沿模型。
  • 保护提示缓存 - 角色范围的亲和力将每个会话保持在已确认的提供者和模型上，同时其缓存窗口处于热状态。
  • 保持并发代理移动——一个会话可以维护独立的廉价通道、中间通道和前沿通道，而无需序列化请求。
  • 更改提供商而不更改应用程序代码 - 在一个端点后面的提供商之间路由兼容的流量。
  • 保持路由可检查——响应标头标识所选路由；当持久性可用时，痕迹和账本条目会保留证据。
  • 自行运行数据平面 - 提供商凭据保留在您的基础设施上，无需托管控制平面。

开始使用

快速入门

从源代码构建时需要 Rust 1.97+。

git clone https://github.com/Northwood-Systems/millwright.git
cd millwright
cargo install --path . --locked
millwright init
millwright serve

millwright init 遍历提供者端点、模型角色、定价以及单独的工作负载和操作员密钥。 它存储对提供者秘密环境变量的引用，而不是提供者凭据本身。

连接 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode、Pi 或其他兼容客户端。 选择 millwright-fast、millwright-code 或 millwright-plan 来请求廉价、中端或前沿角色。

可选的本地演示

包含的 Docker Compose 设置使用模拟提供程序和本地演示密钥启动 Millwright：

make compose-up

从另一个终端：

curl http://localhost:8080/v1/chat/completions \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-millwright-local-demo' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"model":"millwright-fast","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Hello from Millwright"}]}'

架构 · 路由器 API · 策略和目录 · 部署 · 成本分析 · 安全

特征

策略控制路由

使用明确的任务和风险标题、客户的模型选择或记录的默认值对请求进行分类。 Millwright 解决廉价、中等或前沿角色，然后选择政策允许的最低估计成本健康模型。 高风险和规划请求始终使用前沿角色。

每个决策都包括所选模型、提供商、路线原因和拒绝的替代方案。 永远不会检查消息内容来做出决定。

缓存感知并发

简单的按请求路由可以通过在会话中切换模型来消除提供程序提示缓存节省的费用。 Millwright 在一个不透明的会话 ID 下保持独立的廉价、中端和前沿关联通道，每个通道都有自己的缓存 TTL。

分配给不同角色的流量不再争夺一条温暖的路线。 相同角色调用集中在最后确认的提供者/模型上，而所有请求保持并发 - Millwright 不会序列化代理流量或编排代理生命周期。

查看支出去向

已完成的请求通常会将使用证据、成本来源、提供商尝试以及路由证据写入分类账。 SQLite是本地默认的； PostgreSQL 可用于生产部署。

命令 它显示了什么
米尔赖特支出 总支出、缓存读取率和每个团队的细分
米尔赖特模型 模型和提供商组合
磨坊匠踪迹<id> 一项路由决策，包括被拒绝的替代方案
米尔赖特顶部 航站楼内的实时支出和模型活动

相同的数据可通过经过身份验证的 /v1/millwright/* 管理 API 获得，并包含来自支出、模型以及仪表板和自动化跟踪的 JSON 输出。

分析成本机会

millwright 分析读取实时 Millwright 分类账或本地 Millwright、OpenAI 兼容或 Anthropic JSONL。 它生成一个独立的 HTML 或 Markdown 报告以及模式版本化的 JSON。

millwright analyze \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:8080 \
  --key "$MILLWRIGHT_OPERATOR_KEY" \
  --since 30d \
  --report analysis.html \
  --json-out analysis.json

报告将测量的成本证据与建模的候选经济学分开。 添加明确的目录和候选许可名单，以比较全部掉期成本和底价经济情景。 候选结果是成本假设，而不是质量结果或生产路线建议。 请参阅成本分析。

提供商和协议支持

OpenAI 聊天完成和人择消息登场；兼容 OpenAI 的 API、原生 Anthropic 和 Amazon Bedrock 已不再可用。 相同协议路由保留 Millwright 未建模的字段。 跨协议路由转换支持的文本和工具子集并拒绝不支持的形状，而不是默默地丢弃数据。

可重试的传输失败、超时、HTTP 408/429 和 HTTP 5xx 响应可以触发一次有界故障转移尝试。 断路器会阻止不健康的路由接收每个请求。

专为自托管而构建

Millwright 作为一种 Rust 二进制文件提供，支持 Docker 和 Docker Compose。 提供者凭证保留在环境变量中，而单独的工作负载和操作员密钥控制推理和管理访问。 结构化日志省略 API 密钥和提示负载；请求体、并发、超时和上游缓冲区都是有限的。

企业

需要帮助在您的基础设施内部署 Millwright、集成提供商或为您的工作负载设计路由策略吗？

与创始人交谈

贡献

欢迎错误修复、功能、测试和文档改进。 在打开拉取请求之前阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md。

贡献者快速入门

Rust 工具链固定在 rust-toolchain.toml 中。

git clone https://github.com/Northwood-Systems/millwright.git
cd millwright
make build
make test

代码质量/Linting

在打开拉取请求之前，运行：

make fmt
make lint
make test
make audit

检查涵盖 Rustfmt、拒绝警告的 Clippy、所有 Rust 测试目标、依赖项建议、批准的许可证和依赖项源。 进行审计需要拒绝货物。 CI 还构建发布二进制文件和 Docker 映像。

执照

阿帕奇-2.0
